name: BRC Inc.
summary: BRC Inc. (BRCC) is a consumer products company focused on coffee, ready-to-drink (RTD) beverages, and energy drinks, with strong brand ties to the military, Veteran, and first-responder communities. The company sells through Direct-to-Consumer (DTC) and Wholesale channels, operates physical retail locations called Outposts, and offers merchandise. It relies on co-manufacturers and third-party suppliers for production and logistics.

products.name: Coffee
products.description: Roasted coffee products sold via DTC and Wholesale channels.

products.name: Ready-to-Drink (RTD) Beverages
products.description: Canned RTD beverages sold through retail and DTC channels.

products.name: Energy Drinks
products.description: Energy drink products competing in the broader energy drink market.

products.name: Merchandise
products.description: Branded merchandise sold alongside coffee and beverage products.

products.name: Outpost Retail Stores
products.description: Physical retail coffee shop locations operated under the Outpost brand.

partnerships.description: Franchise operators managing and operating franchise Outpost retail locations.
